title: selaginella fragilis
intro: Selaginella fragilis, also known as brittle club moss or fragile spikemoss, is a species of flowering plant in the genus Selaginella. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to inhibit the growth of certain bacteria and fungi, making it useful in traditional medicine to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Selaginella fragilis include its potential to reduce inflammation, alleviate respiratory problems, and even exhibit antioxidant properties. Herbal preparations of Selaginella fragilis can be found in various forms, including teas, infusions, and extracts, which are often used to promote overall well-being and alleviate symptoms associated with certain health conditions.
